title: The Guides
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Guides''' were the [[dashta eel]]s that interacted with [[Cestian]]s. They acted as priests, prophets, healers, and advisors. Living beneath the surface of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] in the [[Dashta Mountains]], they lived in hidden grottos until they fully developed. The [[X'Ting]] and other Cestians forced into labor by the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics]] looked to the Guides for hope and good fortune. After the Five Families were destroyed, the Guides fled deep into the grottoes, never to be seen again.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
